titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 973

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=804 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 14:52:15.583568+00 | translation moa=805 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 14:52:15.597286+00

p.cl:
. W . rex anglorum . Thomę eburacensi archiepiscopo . et omnibus suis fidelibus francis et anglicis et scottis
salutem .

concessisse deo omnipotenti . et ęcclesię dunelmensi . et sancto confessori cuthberto . et Willelmo
episcopo . et monachis in eadem ęcclesia deo seruientibus et inperpetuum seruituris terras in lodeneio quas
EADGARVS rex filius malcolmi regis scottorum deo et supradictę ęcclesię me concedente donauit . man
sionem scilicet de berwic . et has subscriptas mansiones . greidene . leinhale . dylsterhale . brycgham
ederham . cirneside . hyltun . blacedre . cynebrihtham . hotun . reinintun . paxtun . fugeldene .
mordintun . lambertun . aliam lambertun . hædrintun . fiscwic . horeford . upsetintun . et mansio
nem de collinghaham . et has subscriptas mansiones . aldcambus . lummesdene . ristun . suinestun . farn
dun . eitun . aliam eitun . prenegest . crammesmue . hædentun . Has superscriptas mansiones
cum adiacentibus terris et siluis et aquis . et omnibus theloneis . et nauuium fracturis . et aliis consuetudinibus
suis . sicut malcolmus rex unquam melius habuit  deo et Sacnto Cuthberto inperpetuum concedo .
William king of the English, to Thomas archbishop of York, and to all his sworn men, French, English, and Gaelic, greeting.

me to have granted to God Almighty, and to the church of Durham, and to the holy confessor Cuthbert, and to Bishop William and the monks in the same church serving God now and for ever in the future, the lands in Lothian which Edgar, son of Malcolm king of Scots, with my consent, donated to God and the above-said church; that is, the manor of Berwick; and these manors written below: Graden, Lennel, Dylsterhale, Birgham, Edrom, Chirnside, Hilton, Blackadder, Kimmerghame, Hutton, Renton, Paxton, Foulden, Mordington, Lamberton, the other Lamberton, Edrington. Fishwick, Horeford, Upsettlington, and the manor of Coldingham; and these manors written below: Old Cambus, Lumsdaine, Reston, Swinton, Farndun, Ayton, the other Ayton, Prenderguest, Cramsmoo, Edington. These manors written above, with their appurtenant lands, woods, water, and all tolls and wrecked ships, and their other customs, just as King Malcolm well had, I grant for ever to God and Saint Cuthbert.
